Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10424 0 0}Oh, are you a student from a school around here?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, you'll be glad to know you can get some quality sushi close by! I make it right here![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}Drop by sometime if you want! ...Oh, actually, our shop is still under renovation. Sorry.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 104 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10607 0 0}...We are a bookstore, not a sushi restaurant.[n]{f 1 1}
